rationale: Gov't Code §2001.221 governs driver's license suspensions and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: This chapter does not apply to a suspension, revocation, cancellation, denial, or disqualification of a driver's license or commercial driver's license
_note: Rule text concerns driver's license administrative procedures; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No intersection.
